sentences.translation: Prijatelj je pitao Ramija o njegovoj porodici.
sentences.translationEn: A friend asked Rami about his family.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّهُ يَعِيشُ مَعَ وَالِدَيْهِ وَأُخْتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao mu je da živi s roditeljima i sestrom.
sentences.translationEn: He told him he lives with his parents and sister.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّ أُسْرَتَهُ صَغِيرَةٌ لَكِنَّهَا سَعِيدَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da je njegova porodica mala ali sretna.
sentences.translationEn: He said his family is small but happy.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضُونَ وَقْتًا كَثِيرًا مَعًا فِي البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Provode puno vremena zajedno kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: They spend a lot of time together at home.
